pr.title: Record: 11L + Hadamard Rotation + VE128 + cuDNN SDPA (val_bpb: 1.1365)

output.summary: Walsh-Hadamard rotates int6 weights to improve compression headroom, enabling VE128 plus cuDNN SDPA while a CPU probe steers config selection.
techniques: Walsh-Hadamard rotation before int6 per-row quantization
CPU parameter probe to pre-screen configurations and reduce GPU search
cuDNN SDPA runtime with VE128 enabled by recovered artifact headroom
